# Error Domain

**API Collection**

The error domain associated with errors reported by the System Configuration framework.

## Constants

- **kCFErrorDomainSystemConfiguration**: A string constant identifying a Core Foundation error domain. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFError] for further information on error domains.

## Constants

- **Status and Error Codes**: The status or error code generated by the most recent System Configuration function call.
